name: nerd-font-picker
title: Nerd Font Picker
description: Browse and copy Nerd Font glyphs from your installed fonts
author: kud

commands.name: list
commands.title: Nerd Font Glyphs
commands.description: Browse and copy Nerd Font glyphs with detailed metadata

preferences.name: fontName
preferences.title: Font Name
preferences.description: Name filter for selecting a Nerd Font when multiple are installed (e.g. JetBrainsMono). Leave blank to use the first font found.

preferences.name: iconColor
preferences.title: Icon Colour
preferences.description: Colour used to render each glyph icon
